title: Storage Phase (Sympathetic Pathway)
buzzwords: outlet kept closed, wall kept quiet
beta3 relaxes detrusor, alpha1 closes internal sphincter

title: Voiding Phase (Parasympathetic Pathway)
buzzwords: M3/M2 muscarinic detrusor contraction with sphincter release

title: Somatic Pudendal Control of External Sphincter
buzzwords: pudendal nerve to external urethral sphincter

title: Detrusor Receptor Pharmacology (M3 and Beta3)
buzzwords: opposing receptors on the same smooth muscle
one relaxes for filling, one contracts for emptying
antimuscarinics and mirabegron target this cell
M3 contracts, beta3 relaxes the detrusor

title: PAG and Pontine Micturition Center
buzzwords: supraspinal switch for the voiding reflex
modulated by prefrontal and limbic cortex
simultaneously excites detrusor and inhibits sphincter
PMC is the master micturition switch

title: Guarding Reflex
buzzwords: tightens outlet when you cough or sneeze
preserved after incomplete spinal cord injury
bladder afferents drive sphincter motor neurons
spinal interneuron loop in sacral cord
